name: CRM Signal Normalizer — Demo Starter
description: Normalizes CRM records using a selected CRM adapter pack so Salesforce, Dynamics 365, HubSpot, or custom sources produce one canonical source_record payload for downstream workflows.

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Poll for changed CRM records every two hours on weekdays, or replace with a webhook if your CRM can push change events.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Swap the source API details for Salesforce, Dynamics, HubSpot, or a custom warehouse API.

nodes.name: Fetch Changed CRM Records

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { source_id: 'fictional-20-crm-signal-normalizer-1', customerName: 'Globex Industries', accountName: 'Globex Industries', records: [{ id: 'fictional-1', status: 'test' }], dry_run: true } }];

nodes.notes: Demo Starter: external source replaced with a fictional local fixture.

nodes.name: Normalize to Canonical Schema
nodes.notes: Map each CRM into the same field contract so downstream workflows do not care whether the source was Salesforce, Dynamics, HubSpot, or a custom system.

nodes.name: Run Mapping QA

options.systemMessage: You are a CRM schema normalization reviewer focused on reusable workflow payloads and adapter-pack driven mappings.

nodes.notes: Optional QA step that catches field drift before the canonical event is published broadly.

nodes.name: Publish Canonical Batch
nodes.notes: Demo Starter: external delivery is disabled.
